title: Render Current Charter Invariants During Integration Install
acceptance: integration add renders installed editor entry files with the current repository charter invariant text from .atm/charter/charter-invariants.json when charter data is available.
Source templates remain placeholder-based, but compiled install outputs no longer leak the raw {{CHARTER_INVARIANTS}} token when a repository charter exists.
When charter invariants are unavailable, install output emits an explicit recovery note instead of shipping a raw unresolved placeholder.
Validators and adapter documentation clearly distinguish source-template placeholders from installed-file charter rendering.
deliverables: delivery-time charter invariant renderer in integrations-core
adapter install wiring for repo-aware skill compilation
validator and documentation updates for rendered charter text
notes:
Owner: `integration-pack`
Priority: `P1`
Allocation: Follow-up to integration UX review where installed Copilot/Codex entry files still exposed the raw charter placeholder to end users.
Coordination: Keep the placeholder in framework-neutral template sources, and perform repo-aware rendering only at install/compile time.
Status: `done`
Validation: `node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-skill-templates.ts`; `node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-integration-adapter.ts`.
Change: Integration installs now render current repo charter invariants, while source templates remain placeholder-based until compile/install time.
